title: Printing Press Operators
description: Set up and operate digital, letterpress, lithographic, flexographic, gravure, or other printing machines. Includes short-run offset printing presses.

tasks.text: Start presses and pull proofs to check for ink coverage and density, alignment, and registration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine job orders to determine quantities to be printed, stock specifications, colors, or special printing instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust ink fountain flow rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify that paper and ink meet the specifications for a given job.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and inspect random samples during print runs to identify any necessary adjustments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Feed paper through press cylinders and adjust feed and tension controls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor automated press operation systems and respond to fault, error, or alert messages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Load presses with paper and make necessary adjustments, according to paper size.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Secure printing plates to printing units and adjust tolerances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean ink fountains, plates, or printing unit cylinders when press runs are completed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Change press plates, blankets, or cylinders, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain or mix inks and fill ink fountains.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Input production job settings into workstation terminals that control automated printing systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean or oil presses or make minor repairs, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain time or production records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor inventory levels on a regular basis, ordering or requesting additional supplies, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor environmental factors, such as humidity and temperature, that may impact equipment performance and make necessary adjustments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Download or scan files to be printed, using printing production software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust digital files to alter print elements, such as fonts, graphics, or color separations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct or monitor work of press crews.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Download completed jobs to archive media so that questions can be answered or jobs replicated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Control workflow scheduling or job tracking, using computer database software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up or operate auxiliary equipment, such as cutting, folding, plate-making, drilling, or laminating machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
